2605.30319.title: Improved Guarantees for Heterogeneous Treatment-Effect Estimation via Matrix Completion
2605.30319.paper_summary: A central goal of modern causal inference is estimating heterogeneous treatment effects to answer questions like "how does an intervention affect each unit," rather than only on average. We study this problem with panel-data where we observe $n$ units across $m$ times under unknown, non-uniform treatment assignments. The data in this setting is naturally represented as a matrix of all unit--time treatment effects. Estimating heterogeneous treatment effects can then be expressed as obtaining a good estimation of each row's average in this matrix. This allows us to formulate the problem as matrix completion, which can be solved under natural low-rankness assumptions. However, existing matrix-completion guarantees are not powerful enough to get meaningful bounds for the per-row guarantee required for estimating the heterogeneous treatment effect; roughly speaking, they are only useful for estimating average treatment effect bounds, as also illustrated in a recent line of work. We give a simple, computationally efficient estimator that, without knowledge of the propensities and under standard low-rankness and regularity assumptions, achieves a row-wise $\ell_2$ error of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{\frac{1}{n} + \frac{n}{m^2}})$. Technically, our analysis establishes the first sharp row-wise $\ell_2$-perturbation bound for low-rank approximation, complementing existing spectral-, Frobenius-, and entrywise perturbation theory.
2605.30319.paper_summary_zh: 現代因果推斷的一個核心目標是估計異質性處理效應，以回答「干預如何影響每個單位」這樣的問題，而不僅僅是平均值。我們研究這個問題，使用面板數據，其中我們觀察到 $n$ 個單位在 $m$ 次時間下的未知、不均勻的處理分配。在這種情況下，數據自然表示為所有單位-時間處理效應的矩陣。估計異質性處理效應可以表達為獲得這個矩陣中每一行平均值的良好估計。這使我們能夠將問題形式化為矩陣補全，該問題可以在自然的低秩假設下解決。然而，現有的矩陣補全保證不足以獲得對於估計異質性處理效應所需的每行保證的有意義界限；粗略來說，它們僅對估計平均處理效應界限有用，這在最近的一系列工作中也得到了說明。我們提供了一個簡單且計算效率高的估計器，在不知道傾向的情況下，並在標準的低秩和正則性假設下，實現了每行的 $\ell_2$ 錯誤為 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{\frac{1}{n} + \frac{n}{m^2}})$。從技術上講，我們的分析建立了低秩近似的第一個精確行級 $\ell_2$ 擾動界限，補充了現有的譜、弗羅貝尼烏斯和逐項擾動理論。
2605.30319.author: Anay Mehrotra et.al.
2605.30319.authors: Anay Mehrotra, Phuc Tran, Van H. Vu, Manolis Zampetakis
